mapper.select: SELECT pc.id, pc.page_id, pc.chart_id, pc.mode, pc.inline_config, pc.x, pc.y, pc.w, pc.h, pc.left_pos, pc.top_pos, pc.width, pc.height, pc.sort_order, pc.create_time, pc.update_time, c.chart_name, c.chart_code, c.chart_type, c.data_source_id, c.sql_content, c.chart_config, c.description, c.status as chart_status FROM page_chart pc LEFT JOIN chart_definition c ON pc.chart_id = c.id WHERE pc.page_id = #{pageId} ORDER BY pc.sort_order ASC, pc.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO page_chart (page_id, chart_id, mode, inline_config, x, y, w, h, left_pos, top_pos, width, height, sort_order, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{pageId}, #{chartId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{mode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inlineConfig,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{x}, #{y}, #{w}, #{h}, #{left}, #{top}, #{width}, #{height}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO page_chart (page_id, chart_id, mode, inline_config, x, y, w, h, left_pos, top_pos, width, height, sort_order, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.pageId}, #{item.chartId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.mode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.inlineConfig,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.x,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.y,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.w,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.h,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.left,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.top,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.width,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.height,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER}, NOW(), NOW())
